name: qaskills
description: QASkills.sh — curated QA testing skills for AI coding agents. Browse 380+ skills at https://qaskills.sh or install individual skills with `npx @qaskills/cli add <skill>`.

plugins.name: qa-essentials
plugins.description: 10 curated QA skills: Claude Code QA, autonomous QA agent, E2E testing (Playwright, Cypress), API testing (REST + Playwright request), pytest patterns, Jest unit testing, and k6 performance testing.
